rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation when binding implementation-level constraints to visible features.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure when embedding AGREE annexes; do not alter component or connection definitions.
Bind contract logic only to features visible within the target’s scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to embed contracts within component types or implementations.
Ensure boolean expressions in guarantees or assumptions use correct type consistency (e.g., bool = int comparison).
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new components, ports, or connections to accommodate AGREE annexes.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless explicitly tied to type-level constants.
